query:
-- Fix the incorrect $900 monthly cost for 13Number - it is a per-minute usage charge at $0.30/min
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map
SET 
  wholesaleCost = 0.21000,
  defaultRetailPrice = 0.30000,
  unit = 'Per Minute',
  productCategory = 'Per Minute Rate (Billed in 1 second intervals)',
  notes = 'Usage charge per minute for outbound 13-number calls. Retail $0.30/min per invoice ST-6796. Wholesale approx $0.21/min (Vocus). NOT a monthly recurring fee.',
  source = 'Invoice ST-6796 (Salter Brothers Clovelly, Feb 2026)',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 90;

-- Fix the duplicate entry (id 30067) - same correction
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map
SET 
  wholesaleCost = 0.21000,
  defaultRetailPrice = 0.30000,
  unit = 'Per Minute',
  productCategory = 'Per Minute Rate (Billed in 1 second intervals)',
  notes = 'Usage charge per minute for outbound 13-number calls. Retail $0.30/min per invoice ST-6796. NOT a monthly recurring fee. Previously incorrectly listed as $900/month annual rental.',
  source = 'Invoice ST-6796 (Salter Brothers Clovelly, Feb 2026)',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 30067;

-- Verify the fix
SELECT id, productName, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice, unit, productCategory, source
FROM supplier_product_cost_map
WHERE id IN (90, 30067);
